{{Quote|Receiving notification that ''Northstar'' missed the jump due to navcomp failure, arrival now expected two-eight-forty. ''Wayfarer'' suffered hyperdrive failure at mission time oh-nine-sixteen and dropped out early. She's now under tow to Alland Yard for repairs.|[[Arky]]|<ref name="SoL" />}}
The '''Alland Yards''' were a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] repair facility in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] which operated during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

{{Station-stub}}
